summary:
The bug is an off-by-one-array-slice error in the `process_batch` function of `processor.py`. Specifically, the line setting the `end` index for slicing is `end = start + batch_size - 1`, which causes the last element of each batch to be dropped when using the slice notation `records[start:end]`. To fix it, change this line to `end = start + batch_size` (around line 12).

After applying the fix and running `./test.sh`, all tests pass:

```
PASS: All records processed correctly across batch boundaries
```
